top_signals.title: Incoming CEO of Poland’s Zabka Seeks to Build Europe’s 7-Eleven
top_signals.summary: Poland’s leading convenience store chain, Zabka Group SA, will prioritize European expansion under its incoming chief executive officer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Blackstone to invest $5 billion in AI infrastructure venture with Google, powered by TPU chips
top_signals.summary: Blackstone is partnering with Google to launch a U.S.-based AI infrastructure company powered by Google’s TPU chips.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: WLFI treasury firm AI Financial posts $271 million quarterly net loss, flags doubt over survival within one year
top_signals.summary: AI Financial posted a net loss of $271.5 million for the quarter ended March 28, compared to a net loss of $2.4 million a year earlier.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Money20/20 Europe Announces Powerhouse Speaker Lineup Featuring Leaders from Klarna, BBVA, ABN AMRO, Mastercard, eToro, and Revolut
top_signals.summary: Leading voices in payments, banking, and fintech innovation to take the stage in Amsterdam
